description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a domed shape and a thick, golden-brown crust. The surface is uneven and textured, with visible flour dusting and a few small cracks and crevices, giving it an artisanal appearance. The crust is mottled with lighter patches of flour and darker baked areas, suggesting a hearty, whole-grain or multigrain composition. There are some embedded seeds or grains visible on the surface, adding to its rustic character. The loaf appears dense and substantial, with a slightly rough and matte finish. No branding, packaging, or slicing is visible, and the bread looks freshly baked and ready for consumption.
description: A round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust, flour dusting, and a rough, artisanal texture.
description_view_0: This view shows the loaf's side with a prominent rough patch and a visible crevice near the base, highlighting the uneven, rustic crust.
description_view_1: The top of the loaf is visible here, showing a broad, domed surface with heavy flour dusting and a few small cracks.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the smooth, rounded side of the loaf with less visible crevices and a more uniform flour pattern.
description_view_3: The loaf appears slightly flatter from this side, with a consistent crust texture and fewer surface irregularities.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, uneven texture with a dusting of white flour and a few small cracks. There are no visible scoring marks, but some embedded seeds or grains are present, giving it an artisanal appearance.
